relations.note: Both apply to the chart section container/headline assembly.
Emphasis colors apply to the hero % figures in statistical callouts.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep charts visually consistent and legible within the brand system.
rules.rule_text: Chart containers must be clean and easy to scan, consistent with the system: uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius = 12px), a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel (chart.panel.fill), and a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar (chart.header_bar.fill).

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.**

rules.intent: Reserve emphasis colors for key data so charts read clearly and consistently.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b, chart.primary.color) and Sky Blue (#358CCB, chart.data.secondary_color) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator series use neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Convey an approachable, friendly brand feel in data visualizations.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must use rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

quotes: ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Standardize chart headline treatment across print and email.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines use Agenda in print and Nunito Sans Bold+ in email, set ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case), in Brand Blue (#00529b, chart.headline.color), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a, chart.headline.rule_color) rule beneath.

quotes: large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Establish clear visual hierarchy so key statistics dominate.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts make the % figure the hero: set it large and bold (chart.statistical_callout.figure.weight), with supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath (chart.statistical_callout.supporting_text.weight).

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Keep footnotes from competing with primary data while remaining legible.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be noticeably smaller than and clearly separated from the primary data.
